name: Devilish Potato Stacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix meat, deviled ham, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into 4 patties.
4. Place the patties in an ungreased baking pan measuring 8 X 8 X 2-inches.
5. Prepare potato puffs according to package instructions, but reduce water to 1 cup. Stir in the cottage cheese and half the onions into the potatoes.
6. Top each patty with 1/4 of the potato mixture.
7. Sprinkle the remaining onions on top.
8. Bake uncovered until desired doneness is reached (30 to 40 minutes).
9. Remove patties from the oven using a slotted spoon and serve on a serving plate.
